race.comment: PAPAL MISS (9) is coming off a last-start sixth, beaten 3 lengths, over 2150m at Ipswich. Goes well for hoop Cormack and is drawn to get all the favours from the inside alley. Hard to go past. LIGHTS WILL GUIDE (4) shed the maiden tag here in impressive fashion last time out and will have derived a stack of confidence from that victory. Can go right on with the job now. HEROIC BEACH (8) produced a moderate effort last start seventh over 2020m at Toowoomba. Is much better than that recent effort suggests and has strong top-three prospects if he brings his A-game. SOUTHOFTHEBORDER (5) is one from one over this distance range and maps nicely for this from gate three. Include in calculations.
